queries: Real-Time Data Ingestion with Kafka E2E pipeline 2023
action.query: Real-Time Data Ingestion with Kafka E2E pipeline 2023

annotations.title: E2E Real-Time Data Pipeline - Data Project Hunt | Data Project Hunt
GitHub - abeltavares/real-time-data-pipeline: 📡 Real-time data pipeline with Kafka, Flink, Iceberg, Trino, MinIO, and Superset. Ideal for learning data systems.

GitHub - airscholar/e2e-data-engineering: An end-to-end data engineering pipeline that orchestrates data ingestion, processing, and storage using Apache Airflow, Python, Apache Kafka, Apache Zookeeper, Apache Spark, and Cassandra. All components are containerized with Docker for easy deployment and scalability.
AffectStream: Kafka-based real-time affect monitoring system using wearable sensors - ScienceDirect
Data pipeline for real-time energy consumption data management and prediction - PMC
Real-Time Anomaly Detection: Integrating Log Service With Agentic AI Pipelines  - DevOps.com
Optimizing Real-Time Data Pipelines with Apache Kafka, Apache Flink, and Snowflake: A Step-by-Step Guide - SuperAGI

content.text:
Here are several authoritative and recent sources on building end-to-end (E2E) real-time data ingestion pipelines using Apache Kafka:

1. **E2E Real-Time Data Pipeline - Data Project Hunt**: This project demonstrates a real-time E2E data pipeline designed to handle clickstream data. It utilizes Apache Kafka for data ingestion, Apache Flink for stream processing, Apache Iceberg for data storage, Trino for querying, and Apache Superset for visualization. ([dataprojecthunt.com](https://www.dataprojecthunt.com/project/7f7d84b3-07da-4b1f-b07f-aea78eca9968?utm_source=openai))

2. **GitHub - abeltavares/real-time-data-pipeline**: This repository provides a real-time data pipeline with Kafka, Flink, Iceberg, Trino, MinIO, and Superset. It's ideal for learning about data systems and showcases the integration of these technologies in an E2E pipeline. ([github.com](https://github.com/abeltavares/real-time-data-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

3. **GitHub - airscholar/e2e-data-engineering**: An end-to-end data engineering pipeline that orchestrates data ingestion, processing, and storage using Apache Airflow, Python, Apache Kafka, Apache Zookeeper, Apache Spark, and Cassandra. All components are containerized with Docker for easy deployment and scalability. ([github.com](https://github.com/airscholar/e2e-data-engineering?utm_source=openai))

4. **AffectStream: Kafka-based real-time affect monitoring system using wearable sensors - ScienceDirect**: This paper discusses AffectStream, a Kafka-based cloud service designed for real-time affect analysis. It outlines the architecture and functionalities of the system, including data ingestion via Kafka, processing, and real-time affect recognition. ([sciencedirect.com](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2352711025002912?utm_source=openai))

5. **Data pipeline for real-time energy consumption data management and prediction - PMC**: This article presents a data pipeline for real-time energy consumption data management and prediction, utilizing InfluxDB and Kafka. It discusses the architecture and components involved in the pipeline. ([pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10983847/?utm_source=openai))

6. **Real-Time Anomaly Detection: Integrating Log Service With Agentic AI Pipelines - DevOps.com**: This guide explores integrating observability logs with AI agents for real-time anomaly detection. It discusses the architecture layers, including streaming ingestion using Kafka, and provides strategies for building resilient systems. ([devops.com](https://devops.com/real-time-anomaly-detection-integrating-log-service-with-agentic-ai-pipelines/?utm_source=openai))

7. **Optimizing Real-Time Data Pipelines with Apache Kafka, Apache Flink, and Snowflake: A Step-by-Step Guide - SuperAGI**: This comprehensive guide discusses optimizing real-time data pipelines using Kafka, Flink, and Snowflake. It provides insights into enhancing performance and reducing costs in real-time data processing. ([web.superagi.com](https://web.superagi.com/optimizing-real-time-data-pipelines-with-apache-kafka-apache-flink-and-snowflake-a-step-by-step-guide?utm_source=openai))

8. **Kafka ETL Data Warehouse | ApiX-Drive**: This article explores the integration of Kafka with data warehouses for real-time data streaming and processing. It discusses the benefits and implementation strategies of using Kafka in ETL data warehouse environments. ([apix-drive.com](https://apix-drive.com/en/blog/other/kafka-etl-data-warehouse?utm_source=openai))

These sources provide a solid foundation for understanding and implementing E2E real-time data ingestion pipelines with Apache Kafka.

output_text:
Here are several authoritative and recent sources on building end-to-end (E2E) real-time data ingestion pipelines using Apache Kafka:

1. **E2E Real-Time Data Pipeline - Data Project Hunt**: This project demonstrates a real-time E2E data pipeline designed to handle clickstream data. It utilizes Apache Kafka for data ingestion, Apache Flink for stream processing, Apache Iceberg for data storage, Trino for querying, and Apache Superset for visualization. ([dataprojecthunt.com](https://www.dataprojecthunt.com/project/7f7d84b3-07da-4b1f-b07f-aea78eca9968?utm_source=openai))

2. **GitHub - abeltavares/real-time-data-pipeline**: This repository provides a real-time data pipeline with Kafka, Flink, Iceberg, Trino, MinIO, and Superset. It's ideal for learning about data systems and showcases the integration of these technologies in an E2E pipeline. ([github.com](https://github.com/abeltavares/real-time-data-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

3. **GitHub - airscholar/e2e-data-engineering**: An end-to-end data engineering pipeline that orchestrates data ingestion, processing, and storage using Apache Airflow, Python, Apache Kafka, Apache Zookeeper, Apache Spark, and Cassandra. All components are containerized with Docker for easy deployment and scalability. ([github.com](https://github.com/airscholar/e2e-data-engineering?utm_source=openai))

4. **AffectStream: Kafka-based real-time affect monitoring system using wearable sensors - ScienceDirect**: This paper discusses AffectStream, a Kafka-based cloud service designed for real-time affect analysis. It outlines the architecture and functionalities of the system, including data ingestion via Kafka, processing, and real-time affect recognition. ([sciencedirect.com](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2352711025002912?utm_source=openai))

5. **Data pipeline for real-time energy consumption data management and prediction - PMC**: This article presents a data pipeline for real-time energy consumption data management and prediction, utilizing InfluxDB and Kafka. It discusses the architecture and components involved in the pipeline. ([pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10983847/?utm_source=openai))

6. **Real-Time Anomaly Detection: Integrating Log Service With Agentic AI Pipelines - DevOps.com**: This guide explores integrating observability logs with AI agents for real-time anomaly detection. It discusses the architecture layers, including streaming ingestion using Kafka, and provides strategies for building resilient systems. ([devops.com](https://devops.com/real-time-anomaly-detection-integrating-log-service-with-agentic-ai-pipelines/?utm_source=openai))

7. **Optimizing Real-Time Data Pipelines with Apache Kafka, Apache Flink, and Snowflake: A Step-by-Step Guide - SuperAGI**: This comprehensive guide discusses optimizing real-time data pipelines using Kafka, Flink, and Snowflake. It provides insights into enhancing performance and reducing costs in real-time data processing. ([web.superagi.com](https://web.superagi.com/optimizing-real-time-data-pipelines-with-apache-kafka-apache-flink-and-snowflake-a-step-by-step-guide?utm_source=openai))

8. **Kafka ETL Data Warehouse | ApiX-Drive**: This article explores the integration of Kafka with data warehouses for real-time data streaming and processing. It discusses the benefits and implementation strategies of using Kafka in ETL data warehouse environments. ([apix-drive.com](https://apix-drive.com/en/blog/other/kafka-etl-data-warehouse?utm_source=openai))

These sources provide a solid foundation for understanding and implementing E2E real-time data ingestion pipelines with Apache Kafka.
